todaysBets.notes: Spurs are an elite home squad and the market is pricing their win rate slightly too low given Portland’s depleted lineup. All models (ESPN BPI, numberFire, Polymarket) true win rate 90%+. Injury report clean for core Spurs; Blazers missing key guards. Perfect 'no drawdown' T1 bet.

Wemby averages 35.5 pts last 5 games, fresh legs, playoff debut, usage spike. Portland has no rim protection, and Wemby's matchup edge is extreme. Model consensus: Over hits 76%. All verification checks passed.

Combining two of the strongest edges in the game. Both legs have model agreement and low correlation risk, Spurs have incentive to sweep quickly, Wemby should be focal point—parlay pays ~2.1x, true hit rate ~69%.
